metadata.description: flow — state-aware ticket→PR delivery for Claude Code and Codex. One target command starts, resumes, repairs, revises, or reports from durable evidence; namespaced workspace, memory, measurement, and maintenance commands share the same harness-neutral engine.

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: State-aware Flow adapter for Claude Code and Codex: a ticket or PR target starts, resumes, repairs, revises, or reports from durable evidence, then runs the approved plan→draft-PR tail in an isolated worktree. Includes portable maintenance, pluggable handlers, immutable ship-event evidence, and compounding memory.
